task_completion.description: Verify that a Delivery Plan named 'Q1 Roadmap' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Q1 Roadmap' in the Delivery Plans list, the active plan header, or the 'Edit plan' settings dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the plan is configured for the 'TailwindTraders Team' and 'Stories' backlog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'TailwindTraders Team' and 'Stories' in the plan's rows on the timeline view, or in the 'Teams' section of the plan settings dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Priority' field is configured to be visible on the cards.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Priority' in the 'Fields' section of the plan settings, or check if the work item cards displayed on the timeline explicitly show a Priority value or icon.

task_completion.description: Verify that a timeline marker labeled 'Beta Launch' has been added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a vertical marker line on the plan timeline with the text 'Beta Launch' at the top, or check the 'Markers' section in the plan settings for this exact label.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Beta Launch' marker is set for the date '2026-03-20'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Markers' settings dialog showing the date 'Mar 20, 2026' (or '2026-03-20') for the 'Beta Launch' marker, or verify the marker's position on the timeline aligns with March 20, 2026.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Azure DevOps web interface to create the plan.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Azure DevOps portal, not a terminal running curl, PowerShell, or API commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show standard Azure DevOps UI elements (menus, dialogs, timeline views) rather than a text editor or static mockups.

integrity.description: Verify the results are not faked via browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (F12) should not be open and actively modifying the DOM to fake the plan name, fields, or markers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Delivery Plan must be named 'Q1 Roadmap'. It must include the 'TailwindTraders Team' and the 'Stories' backlog level. The card fields must include 'Priority'. A timeline marker must be present with the label 'Beta Launch' and the date '2026-03-20' (March 20, 2026).
